json.text:
Deep Research is an OpenAI capability in ChatGPT that automates multi-step web research. Instead of answering from a single page, it plans a research strategy, reads across many sources, compares and cross-checks them, and then produces a structured brief with quotes and citations. It’s meant for tasks like market landscapes, due diligence, literature reviews, and other questions that need sustained reasoning and source-backed synthesis.

If you’d like, tell me your topic and constraints (deadline, preferred sources, depth), and I can outline how to use Deep Research effectively—or help you run a comparable multi-step research workflow right here.

content.text:
Deep Research is an OpenAI capability in ChatGPT that automates multi-step web research. Instead of answering from a single page, it plans a research strategy, reads across many sources, compares and cross-checks them, and then produces a structured brief with quotes and citations. It’s meant for tasks like market landscapes, due diligence, literature reviews, and other questions that need sustained reasoning and source-backed synthesis.

If you’d like, tell me your topic and constraints (deadline, preferred sources, depth), and I can outline how to use Deep Research effectively—or help you run a comparable multi-step research workflow right here.

content.text:
Deep Research is an OpenAI capability in ChatGPT that automates multi-step web research. Instead of answering from a single page, it plans a research strategy, reads across many sources, compares and cross-checks them, and then produces a structured brief with quotes and citations. It’s meant for tasks like market landscapes, due diligence, literature reviews, and other questions that need sustained reasoning and source-backed synthesis.

If you’d like, tell me your topic and constraints (deadline, preferred sources, depth), and I can outline how to use Deep Research effectively—or help you run a comparable multi-step research workflow right here.
